items.description: Dividend stocks are a good way for investors to diversify their strategies.

items.title: Netflix, United Airlines, GE Aerospace, Intel, CPE, and More to Watch This Week
items.description: Roughly 30 S&P 500 companies are set to report results this week. Economic data include the personal consumption expenditures price index and a GDP growth estimate.

items.title: Trump Speech, Earnings and Other Key Things to Watch this Week
items.description: Markets enter a holiday-shortened week with the Martin Luther King, Jr. Day closure Monday, followed by a convergence of events including President Trump's inauguration speech Wednesday at 8:30am

items.title: Jim Cramer Says: “J&J Deserves to Be Going Higher, But Not at This Speed, Not at This Pace”
items.description: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer shared his thoughts on. items.title: Jim Cramer on Procter & Gamble: “It’s the Worst Because They’ve Told You the Worst Is Coming”
items.description: The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer shared his thoughts on.
